question_text: A light bulb converts electrical energy into light and heat. Which of these is the useful energy output?

options.label: C
options.text: All the energy is equally useful

options.label: D
options.text: The energy lost to the surroundings

explanation: For a light bulb used for lighting, the useful energy is the light it produces. The heat energy released is considered wasted energy because it is not what we want the light bulb to do.
